definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">graphic_compute_fogcolor</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_binary_ops" inline="false"><field name="OP">AND</field><value name="A"><block type="logic_negate"><value name="BOOL"><block type="entity_is_underwater"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="logic_negate"><value name="BOOL"><block type="entity_haspotioneffect"><field name="potion">CUSTOM:Mist</field><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="entity_haspotioneffect"><field name="potion">CUSTOM:Curse</field><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="graphic_set_fogcolor"><value name="color"><block type="graphic_get_rgbcolor"><value name="red"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">153</field></block></value><value name="green"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">141</field></block></value><value name="blue"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">163</field></block></value></block></value></block></statement></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
